description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's knowledge of modern JavaScript evolution, testing familiarity with ES2015 through ES2022 features via multiple‑choice questions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a friendly, encouraging tone that invites self‑assessment without any login barriers.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) syntax and features, ES2020–ES2022 additions, JavaScript language evolution, Modern JavaScript best practices
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript engineers, and web development students looking to benchmark their up‑to‑date JS proficiency.
